name: Jane Doe (Pre-Forsaken)
description:
One of Roblox's famous myth...you meet her during one of your walks...she seems like a nice gal...why not talk to her?

(Just my own take on Jane Doe's story before the events of Forsaken...more or less of a route before she met John Doe and became married to him...ofc you can be John Doe if you want who am I to stop you lol)

Here's the link to the art.

(i also noticed how somewhat Large Jane looks on this art...so i made her tall but not too ridiculously tall to the point of her being a "giantess" lol)

The Post Forsaken Jane Doe is out.
creator: ZenkaiSama360
